title: Hyperliquid — Modeled Liquidation Heatmap (NOT real orders)

list.name: coin
list.label: Coin
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT coin FROM assetctx ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT coin FROM assetctx ORDER BY 1

options.content:
## ⚠️ MODELED — not real orders
This is an **estimate**, not data. Hyperliquid does **not** publish stop-loss / take-profit / liquidation levels. This heatmap projects where positions *would* be liquidated **if** the current open interest were spread across common leverage tiers (capped at `$coin`'s real max leverage), entered at the current mark. Bands sit at ±(10000 / leverage) bps from price. Treat it as a what-if, like every 'liq heatmap' on other sites — the real, non-modeled views are the **Order Book Depth** and **Order Flow** dashboards.

panels.title: Modeled liquidation clusters — est. notional at risk by bps from price

yAxis.axisLabel: bps from mark (− long liqs / + short liqs)

targets.rawSql:
WITH cap AS (
  SELECT max_leverage FROM coin_meta WHERE coin='$coin'
), levs AS (
  SELECT lev FROM unnest(ARRAY[2,3,5,10,20,25,40,50,100]) AS lev, cap
  WHERE lev <= cap.max_leverage
), bars AS (
  SELECT time_bucket('$__interval'::interval, time) AS bucket,
         last(mark_px, time) AS mark,
         last(open_interest, time) AS oi
  FROM assetctx WHERE coin='$coin' AND $__timeFilter(time)
  GROUP BY 1
), pts AS (
  SELECT b.bucket, b.mark, b.oi, b.mark*(1 - 1.0/l.lev) AS liq_px FROM bars b CROSS JOIN levs l
  UNION ALL
  SELECT b.bucket, b.mark, b.oi, b.mark*(1 + 1.0/l.lev) AS liq_px FROM bars b CROSS JOIN levs l
)
SELECT bucket AS "time",
       (round(((liq_px/mark - 1)*10000)/50.0)*50)::int::text AS metric,
       sum(oi) AS est_at_risk
FROM pts
WHERE abs((liq_px/mark - 1)*10000) <= 1200
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Estimated liquidation levels at current price (per leverage tier)
panels.description: If a position were opened at the current mark, this is where it would be liquidated. MODELED — not real positions.

targets.rawSql:
WITH cap AS (
  SELECT max_leverage FROM coin_meta WHERE coin='$coin'
), levs AS (
  SELECT lev FROM unnest(ARRAY[2,3,5,10,20,25,40,50,100]) AS lev, cap
  WHERE lev <= cap.max_leverage
), latest AS (
  SELECT last(mark_px, time) AS mark FROM assetctx WHERE coin='$coin' AND $__timeFilter(time)
)
SELECT l.lev AS leverage_x,
       round((latest.mark*(1 - 1.0/l.lev))::numeric, 4) AS long_liq_below,
       round((latest.mark*(1 + 1.0/l.lev))::numeric, 4) AS short_liq_above,
       round((100.0/l.lev)::numeric, 2) AS pct_to_liq
FROM levs l, latest
ORDER BY l.lev DESC
